differential_diagnoses: Legionnaires' disease (Legionella pneumophila) with severe rhabdomyolysis and AKI
Toxic myopathy secondary to supplement contamination
next_steps: Lower respiratory tract specimen (sputum or BAL) for Legionella culture and PCR
Serum myoglobin, phosphorus, and uric acid monitoring
Detailed environmental exposure history (water systems, wildlife, birds, farm animals)
Transthoracic echocardiogram to assess for complications of severe sepsis
